title: AI Zillionaires Are Starting to Get Scared as the Public Turns Against Them
abstract: Have you heard? AI billionaires are scrambling as the public turns against them! Even the mighty are afraid of public wrath. Jump aboard to see how this anti-AI wave is sweeping the globe!
abstract_zh: 你听说没？那些AI富豪们最近可慌了神，因为公众开始不待见他们啦！是的，连大神都怕了怕众怒，这阵势堪比明星被粉丝围堵。赶紧上车，看看这股反AI浪潮如何席卷全球吧！
